slides.headline: One month in.
slides.eyebrow: Behind the Scenes · Month 1 in numbers

slides.body: Here's everything we built, the numbers behind it, and what Month 2 looks like. ↓

THE NUMBERS
📬 Applications received: 20
✅ Composers vetted: 6
📋 Briefs received from supervisors: 3
🎵 Tracks pitched: 11
🤝 Placements confirmed: 1
⏱ Fastest turnaround (brief to delivery): 48 hours

THE CATALOGUE
6 composers. 47 tracks. 100% with ISRCs. 100% one-stop cleared. 100% stems available.

THE CONTENT
42 pieces of content across 5 platforms in 30 days.

WHAT WE LEARNED
→ Speed wins. Every brief we didn't win was lost on response time, not quality.
→ Rights is the highest barrier. 9 of 14 rejected applications had rights issues.
→ Supervisors want African music. Genuinely. The demand is real and explicit.
→ The brief-to-placement cycle is faster than we expected.
→ Building in public works. Application volume doubled in Week 3. MONTH 2
More composers. More briefs. More placements.
More content to prove it's real. Follow along. #SyncMaster #BuildingInPublic #AfricanComposers #SyncLicensing #MusicBusiness
